vix_wide_atr_low_rv.description: ATR stops at 2.0x/3.0x (wider for LOW_RV survival)

orb_wide_atr.description: ATR stops at 2.0x/4.0x (wider for HIGH_VOL noise)

vix_tight_targets.description: RV-scaled channel with 0.5x TP (quick profits in RANGING)

pb_shallow_pullback.description: Remove ADX + lower VOL_MULT + single window + remove strong_close

vix_ema_trend.description: EMA alignment confirmation on entry direction

orb_relaxed_entry.description: Remove VWAP slope + widen candle strength + extend window

orb_ema_trend.description: EMA alignment confirmation on breakout direction

vix_range_fade.description: Range fade filter (enter at Bollinger extremes)

orb_range_fade.description: Range fade filter (fade range boundaries after OR)
